name: equilis-india
description: Indian equity research skill for Claude Code. Provides scenario-based fundamental analysis, forensic checks, peer comparison, and macro overlay for NSE/BSE stocks. No investment recommendations.

commands.name: research
commands.description: Run full equity research pipeline for a ticker

commands.name: peer
commands.description: Build peer comparison table for a sector

commands.name: concall
commands.description: Parse and summarise an earnings concall transcript
